_comment: Learner-friendly definition overlay for CORE concepts that FIBO ships with no skos:definition. Applied by etl/to_okf.py, which marks the description `definition_provenance: curated` and keeps FIBO's resource: IRI. Each rewrite is GROUNDED in the class's FIBO superclass + owl:Restriction structure (see grounded_in) — not invented. Never override a concept that already has a real FIBO definition.

definitions.title: mortgage product
definitions.definition: loan product, offered by a lender, that is realized as a mortgage — a loan secured by real property — with specific eligibility criteria, characteristics, and terms
definitions.grounded_in: rdfs:subClassOf LoanProduct ('financial product realized as a loan ... with specific characteristics and terms'); a mortgage is a loan secured by real property

definitions.title: loan application status
definitions.definition: classifier indicating the state of a loan application at a particular point in its lifecycle, such as submitted, under review, approved, declined, or withdrawn
definitions.grounded_in: rdfs:subClassOf fibo-fnd-arr-lif:LifecycleStatus ('classifier indicating the position or state of something at a particular point in its life-cycle'); stage names illustrative

definitions.title: loan application phase
definitions.definition: distinct phase in the lifecycle of a loan application, such as pre-qualification, application intake, underwriting, or decisioning
definitions.grounded_in: rdfs:subClassOf fibo-fnd-arr-lif:LifecycleStage ('phase in a lifecycle'); phase names illustrative

definitions.title: loan phase
definitions.definition: distinct phase in the lifecycle of a loan, such as origination, disbursement, repayment, or closure
definitions.grounded_in: rdfs:subClassOf fibo-fnd-arr-lif:LifecycleStage ('phase in a lifecycle'); phase names illustrative

definitions.title: repayment phase
definitions.definition: phase in a loan's lifecycle during which the borrower repays outstanding principal and interest according to the loan's payment schedule
definitions.grounded_in: rdfs:subClassOf fibo-loan-ln-ev:LoanPhase (a phase in the lifecycle of a loan)

definitions.title: consumer credit protection law
definitions.definition: consumer protection law that regulates the extension of credit to consumers — governing matters such as disclosure of terms and costs, fair lending, and borrower rights (for example, in the US, the Consumer Credit Protection Act and its implementing regulations)
definitions.grounded_in: rdfs:subClassOf fibo-loan-ln-reg:ConsumerProtectionLaw (a consumer protection law), specialized to the extension of credit; US example is illustrative

definitions.title: borrower disclosure requirement
definitions.definition: regulatory requirement that a lender disclose specified information to a borrower or prospective borrower — such as the terms and costs of a loan product — conferring a corresponding right to that information and governing how the borrower is assessed
definitions.grounded_in: rdfs:subClassOf fibo-loan-ln-reg:DisclosureRequirement ('Requirement for disclosure to borrowers or potential borrowers'); confers ProductDisclosureRight; governs BorrowerAssessment (owl:Restriction axioms)
